# Brian Ward Appraisal

> Certified residential real estate appraiser serving Palm Desert and the Coachella Valley since 2004.

## Business Information

- Business Name: Brian Ward Appraisal
- Owner: Brian Ward, California Certified Residential Appraiser
- Phone: (760) 534-5449
- Email: contact@brianward.com
- Primary Website: https://www.brianward.com
- Regional Website: https://www.palmdesertappraiser.com (Palm Desert and Coachella Valley branded page of brianward.com)
- Location: Palm Desert, California
- Founded: 2004
- Experience: 20+ years, 7,000+ completed appraisals
- Rating: 5.0 stars from 70+ verified reviews
- License: California Certified Residential Real Estate Appraiser

## Services Offered

- Date of Death Appraisals ($299-$425)
- Divorce Appraisals ($299-$425)
- Estate and Trust Appraisals ($299-$425)
- Bankruptcy Appraisals ($299-$425)
- Tax Appraisals ($299-$425)
- Pre-Purchase Appraisals ($299-$425)
- Pre-Sale Appraisals ($299-$425)
- Family Transaction Appraisals ($299-$425)
- Insurance Dispute Appraisals ($299-$425)

- Expert Witness Testimony ($725+)

## Service Area

Palm Desert, Palm Springs, Rancho Mirage, Indian Wells, La Quinta, Indio, Cathedral City, Desert Hot Springs, Coachella, Thousand Palms, and Bermuda Dunes -- all located in the Coachella Valley region of Riverside County, California.

## Turnaround Time

Most reports delivered within 3-5 business days. Rush service available for time-sensitive deadlines.

## Key Differentiators

- Direct access to the appraiser (no call center or middleman)
- Local market expertise spanning 20+ years in the Coachella Valley
- USPAP-compliant reports accepted by courts, attorneys, the IRS, and lenders
- Weekend and evening inspection availability
- Specializes in estate, divorce, and date-of-death appraisals (1,000+ completed)
